pr.title: Add record: Optimizer Tuning + Sliding Window Eval (val_bpb=1.1864)

output.summary: Tuned warmdown, muon steps, grad clipping, and scalar LR while training at seq2048 and using sliding-window eval, keeping the baseline arch with int8+zlib compression.
techniques: Seq2048 training with extended warmdown and tuned muon backend
Sliding-window stride-64 evaluation to give each token maximum context
Int8+zlib artifact to stay under the 16MB cap
